title: Durable decision log at top-level; transient coordination in .switchboard/
context: Where the per-project state lives within a repo.

options.name: all-in-dotfolder
options.tradeoff: Buries durable memory in machinery; not browsable as docs.

options.name: split
options.rationale: Durable decisions visible at top-level; queue/results in .switchboard/.

reasoning: Decisions are documentation of the code and must be browsable by anyone in the repo; the queue and results are operational scheduling and can be gitignored.
